name: Speedrunner Vs Hunter
description: A client-side mod intended to allow players to try a basic "Speedrunner Vs. Hunter" minigame (wholly inspired by fireb0rn's Speedrunner Vs. Hunter videos for Hollow Knight). This mod may be useful to you even if you don't want to play Speedrunner Vs. Hunter.<LINE><LINE>How does it work? It is actually surprisingly simple...<LINE>THIS MOD ADDS:<LINE>* IF the lobby host has this mod, then clients who ALSO have this mod can join the game even after the host changes regions (goes through a gate). Newcomers will be placed in the nearest shelter in the new region.<LINE>* Adds a "Random Shelter" checkbox that will attempt to spawn the player in a random shelter in the region OTHER THAN the host's shelter.<LINE><LINE>This mod is client-side, meaning that you should be able to play with others even if they don't have the mod. Being able to join after changing regions should hopefully be a general quality-of-life feature.<LINE><LINE>Intended way to play Speedrunner Vs. Hunter:<LINE>* TEAMS: The lobby should be divided into two teams: The Speedrunners and the Hunters. The host should always be on the Speedrunners team (because the host can go through gates), and anyone who does not have this mod should also be on the Speedrunners team (because they won't be able to use the Random Shelter feature).<LINE>* RANDOM SHETLERS: All Hunters should check the "Random Shelter" checkbox, so that they don't spawn on top of the Speedrunners. Speedrunners should leave it unchecked.<LINE>* FRIENDLY FIRE: Turn on Friendly Fire so that the Hunters can actually kill the Speedrunners. Require Campaign Slugcat may also be useful to prevent the lobby from being filled with Artificers.<LINE>* WIN-CONDITIONS: The Speedrunners win if they beat the campaign. The Hunters win if the Speedrunners die at karma 1 (like Expedition). HOWEVER, these win-conditions are totally arbitrary, so feel free to make up whatever is most fun for you (maybe the Speedrunners should have 90 minutes total to beat the game? Idk).<LINE>* RESPAWNING: It is recommended that neither the Speedrunners nor the Hunters be allowed to respawn if they die, just to keep things fair (since the host cannot respawn). However, perhaps some Hunters should be allowed to rejoin the game after the Speedrunners pass through a karma gate.<LINE>* OTHER MODS: It is HIGHLY recommended to use the Better Host Control mod. Using that mod, the Speedrunners can briefly kick the Hunters to the lobby so that they can pass through a gate. Or I guess you could ask the Hunters nicely, "Hey, would you quit rq to let us through the gate please, and then rejoin?" but that would require cooperative players.<LINE><LINE>* FLEXIBILITY: Feel free to add/remove/modify any and all of these rules (except the first one; the host really should be a Speedrunner) to your liking. I do not know which rules will be the most fun. If I had many hours to experiment with my friends, I would provide you with a better ruleset - I have neither many hours of playtime nor many friends, so please experiment with your own rules and let me know how it goes!<LINE><LINE>In summary: The intention for this gamemode is to be a normal story experience except a few players are trying to cause chaos and death. In general, the simpler the rules of the game, the better. This way even people who do not have this mod can join and participate by just playing normal Story mode.<LINE><LINE>Why is this mod so barebones?<LINE>1. You know what they say, Lazy is my middle name! ...wait, it actually is my middle name here. Huh.<LINE>2. I do not know what rules will work best for this gamemode. I could try to make code that enforces the rules of the game, but I might just end up making it less fun and more restrictive. In its current state, this mod is just designed to help players trying their own mini-games. It might be useful for Hide and Seek; idk.<LINE>3. I want the mod to be client-side, because it makes playing the game way more accessible, and it is annoying to have to switch mods on and off whenever changing lobbies. However, being client-side severely limits what I can do with this mod.<LINE><LINE>Sorry that this mod is a little weird. PLEASE leave suggestions and especially bug reports. Let me know if something is broken, because otherwise I probably won't ever know to fix it! (Apparently Better Host Controls was broken for many months and no one told me!)
